user.title: Set up HALP!
user.description: Select the Home Assistant Person entity HALP! should analyze. HALP! will not modify the Person entity or any trackers.

classify_person_sources_v2.title: Classify assigned location sources
classify_person_sources_v2.description: Below are the trackers assigned to {person_name}. Classify each source as GPS, WiFi/router, BLE, or Other.

error.at_least_one_classified_source_required: At least one assigned tracker must be classified as GPS, WiFi/router, or BLE.

abort.already_configured: This Person entity is already configured in HALP!.

init.title: Configure HALP!
init.description: Adjust HALP!'s reliability threshold and source weights.

tuning.title: Tune HALP! reliability scoring
tuning.description: Reliable threshold is a 0 to 100 confidence percentage. Source weights are voting strength values from 0 to 200.

error.at_least_one_classified_source_required: At least one assigned tracker must be classified as GPS, WiFi/router, or BLE.
